name: Charlie Pagnard
body: Been praying all day for a very special child!!

name: Roxane Jackson
body: Thinking of you and praying for your family today!

name: Makenna Roberts
body: Sending lots of prayers for a smooth surgery. A speedy recovering and continuing faith. It was an honor to take care of Lyla.

name: Joy Reeder
body: Praying the Great Physicians hands will guide every second of this surgery and praying for all of you as well!

name: Tylana Miller
body: Praying now and all day for all of you!

name: Valerie Hough
body: Praying for all of you right now—for the surgery, recovery, and for those steps of faith to be used mightily in your lives and the lives around you.

name: Emily Lee
body: Sweet new friends that we feel a kinship with even though we haven't known each other long...we love you guys. We've been praying. We know the scariness and the uncertainty in the hospital. I understand all too well that the one at the bedside waiting and watching has it harder in many ways than the patient. But, ultimately, God is bigger. He's bigger than the surgeon, the complication, the mass... Little Lyla gets it. ❤️😭 So beautiful.

name: Craig and Lisa Dotson
body: Still thinking of you all - still praying for each one of you with much love and in His name. 🙏💕

name: Sondra Rush
body: Thank you for sharing. What a beautiful example and reminder of our need for a big God. So much beauty and wisdom in Lyla. Thanking God for her life and beauty and praying for you all.

name: Scott Roark
body: “Well, I guess it just felt right to make myself smaller and God bigger."Gonna be writing that down. Praying for Lyla and the physicians.

name: Jessica Wekke
body: I'm Jessica, the oldest daughter of Kathy Charles. We are thinking of and praying for Lyla. Just said a prayer for her as I know she is undergoing surgery today.

name: Julie Hickman
body: What faith from ya’ll. On my knees now. Tears overflowing Aunt Julie

name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: Please know that MANY are praying for Lyla and her beautiful family.
